title: Midbrain astrocyte and co-culture

","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"611fo","text":"D25+ (Long-Term Media) DMEM/F-12+Glutamax + 13 B-27 minus vitamin A + 13 N-2 + 10 ng/mL BDNF + 10 ng/mL GDNF + 0.2 μM Ascorbic Acid + 10 ng/mL CNTF.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"af210","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Midbrain NPC were generated following the publish protocol https://www.protocols.io/view/midbrain-organoid-differentiation-in-spinner-flask-rm7vzbnr4vx1/v1 with modifications listed bellow.
From a 80% confluent plate of iPSCs in a 10 cm plate.
Wash with 5ml of PBS
For the passaging add 3 mL of ACCUTASE™ 100 mL STEMCELL Technologies Inc. Catalog #7920
Add 5 mL of StemFlex , gently mix and transfer to a 15 ml conical tube.
300 rcf, 25 °C, 3 minutes
Resuspend the cells in 1 mL of StemFlex with rock inhibitor and Count the cells using Countess II (Life Technologies, AMQAX1000)
Plate 2 million cells in a 1/100 Geltrex LDEV Free hESC Quality 5 ml Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #A1413302 coated plate in Stemflex with 10 μM Y-27632.
D0 change half the media with D0-1 medium.
D2 change half the media with D2-3 medium.
D3 Change half the media with D2-3 medium.
D4 change half the media with D4-7 medium.
D5 change half the media with D4-7 medium.
D6 change half the media with D4-7 medium.
D7 change half the media with D4-7 medium.
D8 change all the media with D8-11 medium.
D9 change half the media with D8-11 medium.
D10 change half the media with D8-11 medium.
D11 change half the media with D8-11 medium.
Freeze the NPCs in STEM-CELLBANKER - GMP Grade amsbio Catalog #11890
In a 96 well plate coated with Geltrex LDEV Free hESC Quality 5 ml Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #A1413302 1/100 plate 50k NPCs
Thaw the NPCs and transfer to a 15 ml conical tube.
Add 5 ml of D12 terminal media with 10 μM Y-27632
300 rcf, 25 °C, 3 minutes
Resuspend the cells in 1 mL D12 terminal media with 10 μM Y-27632 and count the cells using Countess II (Life Technologies, AMQAX1000)
Change half media every day until day 25.
Obtain astrocytes following protocol https://www.protocols.io/view/astrocyte-extraction-from-brain-organoids-261ge364wl47/v2
Thaw the Astrocytes and transfer to a 15 ml conical tube.
Add 5 ml of A Astrocyte Medium ScienCell Catalog # #1801 with 10 μM Y-27632.
300 rcf, 25 °C, 3 minutes
Resuspend the cells in 1 mL D12 terminal media with 10 μM Y-27632 and count the cells using Countess II (Life Technologies, AMQAX1000)
Plate 10k on the neurons.
Mature the co-cultures until day 50 changing media every other day with day 25 media.
creator: gustavo.parfitt Parfitt
